member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentsController.SearchDocuments(System.String,System.Nullable{TripleSService.Services.DocumentStatus},System.Int32)
member.summary: Search for documents using specific criteria. For security and performance reasons, retrieving all documents is not allowed in disconnected mode.
member.param: Maximum number of results to return (capped at 100)
member.returns: A list of documents matching the search criteria

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocument(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a specific document by ID from Hyland

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentsController.CreateDocument(TripleSService.Services.CreateDocumentRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new document in Hyland

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentsController.UpdateDocument(System.String,TripleSService.Services.UpdateDocumentRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing document in Hyland

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentsController.DeleteDocument(System.String)
member.summary: Soft deletes a document in Hyland

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentsController.SearchDocuments(TripleSService.Services.DocumentSearchRequest)
member.summary: Searches documents in Hyland based on criteria

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetDocumentContent(System.String)
member.summary: Downloads the content of a document from Hyland
member.returns: The document content as a file

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentsController.GetQueryMeteringStatus
member.summary: Gets the current query metering status

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.SearchByDocumentId(System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Int32,TripleSService.Services.DocumentRetrievalOptions)
member.summary: Search documents by ID or ID range using Hyland Unity API patterns
member.param: Starting document ID for range search
Ending document ID for range search
Document retrieval options for performance optimization
member.returns: List of documents matching the ID criteria

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.SearchByDocumentTypeAndDateRange(System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Int32,TripleSService.Services.DocumentRetrievalOptions)
member.summary: Search documents by Document Type and Date Range using Hyland Unity API patterns
member.param: Start date for document storage date range
End date for document storage date range
Start date for document date range
End date for document date range
Document retrieval options for performance optimization
member.returns: List of documents matching the criteria

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.SearchByCustomQueryAndKeywords(TripleSService.Services.DocumentSearchRequest)
member.summary: Search documents using Custom Queries, Keywords, and Date Range using Hyland Unity API patterns
member.param: Advanced search request with custom query, keywords, and date filters
member.returns: List of documents matching the custom query criteria

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.GetAvailableCustomQueries
member.summary: Get available custom queries for the current user

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.GetDocumentStatusEnum
member.summary: Get document status enumeration values and ordinals
member.returns: Document status enum names and ordinal positions

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.GetSearchMethodsEnum
member.summary: Get search method enumeration values and ordinals
member.returns: Search method enum names and ordinal positions

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.GetRetrievalOptionsEnum
member.summary: Get retrieval options enumeration values and ordinals
member.returns: Retrieval options enum names and ordinal positions

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.GetKeywordDataTypesEnum
member.summary: Get keyword data type enumeration values and ordinals
member.returns: Keyword data type enum names and ordinal positions

member.name: M:TripleSService.Controllers.DocumentSearchController.GetSearchOperatorsEnum
member.summary: Get search operator enumeration values and ordinals
member.returns: Search operator enum names and ordinal positions
